# Clínica Hispana Airline - Houston, TX

## About
Clínica Hispana Airline is a Hispanic medical clinic located in Houston, Texas. We provide professional healthcare services 100% in Spanish for the Hispanic community.

## Location
- Address: 934 E Tidwell Rd, Houston, TX 77022
- Phone: (346) 626-4110
- Email: clinicahispanaairline@gmail.com

## Hours
- Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 9:00 PM
- Saturday - Sunday: 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM

## Services
We offer comprehensive medical services including:
- Family Medicine (Medicina Familiar)
- Immigration Medical Exams (I-693)
- STD Testing and Treatment
- Urology Services
- Chronic Disease Management (Diabetes, Hypertension)
- Clinical Laboratory
- Ultrasound
- Gynecology Services
- Family Planning
- Contraceptive Injections
- Implant Removal
- Electrocardiogram (EKG)
- Respiratory Diseases Treatment
- Urinary Tract Infections
- Vaginal Infections Treatment
- DOT Medical Exams
- General Physical Exams
- Muscle Pain Treatment

## Languages
- Spanish (Primary)
- English

## Insurance
We accept most insurance plans. Uninsured patients welcome with affordable pricing.

## Ratings
- Google Reviews: 491 reviews with 5.0 average rating

https://clinicahispanaairline.com

## Contact
For appointments or questions, call (346) 626-4110 or visit our clinic. Walk-ins welcome.
